mapper.insert:
insert into `role_permission` (role_permission_id, role_id, permission_id, is_valid) values
#{item.rolePermissionId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.permissionId}, #{item.isValid}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.role_permission_id, t.role_id, t.permission_id, t.is_valid, r.role_id as r_role_id, r.role_name as r_role_name, r.is_valid as r_is_valid, p.permission_id as p_permission_id, p.permission_name as p_permission_name, p.permission_url as p_permission_url, p.is_valid as p_is_valid FROM role_permission t LEFT JOIN role r ON r.role_id = t.role_id AND r.is_valid = 1 LEFT JOIN permission p ON p.permission_id = t.permission_id AND p.is_valid = 1
AND t.is_valid = 1

SELECT t.permission_id, t.permission_name, t.permission_url, t.is_valid FROM `permission` t
AND t.is_valid = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `role_permission` rp WHERE rp.permission_id = t.permission_id AND rp.is_valid = 1 AND role_id = #{roleId})
AND t.permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.permissionNameLike}, '%')

SELECT t.permission_id, t.permission_name, t.permission_url, t.is_valid FROM `permission` t
AND t.is_valid = 1 AND NOt EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `role_permission` rp WHERE rp.permission_id = t.permission_id AND rp.is_valid = 1 AND role_id = #{roleId})
AND t.permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.permissionNameLike}, '%')
